metadata.title: Tales of Budapest
metadata.description: AI-powered location audio tours through Budapest

player.tapToGenerate: Tap play to generate your audio tour
player.beginExperience: Tap play to begin your experience
player.tapTranscriptToSeek: Tap a line to jump to that moment.
player.transcriptUnavailable: The transcript will appear here once the audio tour has been generated.
player.thinSourceNote: Limited historical sources — we've woven what's known into this stop.
player.swipeUpForMore: Swipe up for transcript and details

navigation.locationPaused: Arrival detection paused while the app was hidden.
navigation.locationDenied: Location access is off. Use the manual button at each stop.
navigation.locationUnavailable: Your position is unavailable. You can continue manually.
navigation.foregroundOnly: Keep this tour open while walking for automatic arrivals.
navigation.downloadWalkDescription: Your route and stop list stay available offline. Map areas you view are saved for the walk too.
navigation.offlinePartial: Some audio could not be saved offline.
navigation.offlineNow: You’re offline; saved audio remains available.

chronicle.title: Chronicle
chronicle.empty: This place's story is still being researched.

search.title: Where do you want to explore?
search.helper: Search by landmark or place in Budapest.
search.empty: No matching places found. Try another name or browse the map.

guide.title: AI Guide
guide.subtitle: Grounded in Budapest's historical sources
guide.welcomeBody: I can explain the people, places, and events behind the city—and show you where to find them.
guide.suggestionOne: Why are Buda and Pest so different?
guide.suggestionTwo: What should I notice around the Parliament?
guide.suggestionThree: Tell me a surprising story about the Chain Bridge.
guide.error: I couldn't answer that right now.

greetings: Where shall our story begin today?
planningMessages: Scouting the best stops for you…
narrative.safeToLeave: You can leave this screen and return later.

questionnaire.title: Plan your tour
questionnaire.customToursUnavailable: Custom tours are not enabled in this staging test.

quickStarts.flagshipImageAlt: Hungarian Parliament and the Danube on the flagship Budapest history walk
quickStarts.communismImageAlt: Hungarian Parliament and Kossuth Square, a key site of the 1956 Revolution
quickStarts.jewishQuarterTagline: About 1¾ h · faith, survival and nightlife

questionnaire.styleQuestion: How do you like your history?
questionnaire.styleHelper: This sets the pace and depth of your tour.
questionnaire.durationQuestion: How much time do you have?
questionnaire.topicsHelper: Pick up to {max} — we'll size the tour for you.
questionnaire.intentPlaceholder: ✨ I already know what I want…

resume.continueSubtitle: You left off at chapter {chapter} of {total}.

archives.label: My tours
archives.title: Your tours
archives.subtitle: Your walking stories, ready to resume or revisit.
archives.empty: No tours yet. Choose Create tour to make your first walking story.

settings.label: Settings
settings.title: Preferences
settings.languageDescription: Choose your app language and landmark labels.
settings.mapDescription: Control how many landmarks appear at once.
settings.showAllBuildingsDescription: When on, ordinary houses appear at city zoom, grouped into clusters.
settings.tourStyleDescription: How landmark audio tours are paced and narrated when you tap play on the map.

map.zoomHint: Zoom in to see more landmarks
